title: Tragical History Tour
description: The Rutle’s first flop that has since gained a cult following. Four Oxford history professors take a hitch-hiking tour of tea shops in the Rutland area.
parent: The Rutles: All You Need is Cash
alt1: the Rutles dressed as professors on the side of the road
alt3: the band performing with lots of weird people dancing around them
alt4: the Rutles in all white suits dancing in unison down some stairs
